policy: Web library is optimized for preview/reference. Full-res print masters live in .local-masters/marketing-library (gitignored). Official Meta brand logos remain under /assets/brand/medvirtual/. Berry co-brand assets are historical — prefer MedVirtual-only for Meta ads.
